topic: Parent-hub defaultMode policy, run 2: a divergent multi-model deep dive over the Divergent Exploration Agenda in the packet spec.md.

noveltyJustification: First iteration; opens Layer-0 vertical Run 1 never examined. Advisor already ships defer-with-clarification + a per-hub mode-projection layer (system-deep-loop) — net-new to this packet.

ruledOut.approach: null pushes disambiguation cost to Layer-0 as stated
ruledOut.reason: Hub defer terminates at the user via UNKNOWN_FALLBACK_CHECKLIST, not back at the advisor; no re-escalation unless a bespoke deep-routing layer is also built

focus: Is detection-routed the universal archetype? sk-design feasibility test
noveltyJustification: Reframes Run 1's hub-level third archetype as per-axis strategy; proves sk-code already hybrid (detect surface, defer workflow); closes detection-universal sub-question with environmental-vs-intentional discriminant.

ruledOut.reason: Requires an environmental signal; the four flipped hubs (cli/deep-loop/mcp/design) have only intentional discriminators — no machine-detectable handle

focus: Second-order anti-patterns of null+mode-map (does the fix recreate the disease?)
noveltyJustification: Stress-tests Run 1's 'load both' fallback rule. Canon already names the hub-identity-on-default mechanism (the disease seed). Discovers 4 anti-patterns (A1 name-unrouteable, A2 menu-vs-scorer split, A3 registry drift user-visible, A4 compressed card) and proposes a semantics split Run 1 did not reach.

ruledOut.reason: Its DEFAULT_RESOURCE=[]; emits typed leaves only on positive score; loads nothing on zero-signal

focus: Edge cases breaking the archetype rule (single-mode, empty map, drift, contextual defaults)
noveltyJustification: Splits Run 1's uniform flip-4 into 1+3 distinct encodings: cli=detection-defaulted (has runtime env signal), other three=pure-defer. Adds canon corrections (single-mode threshold >=2; drift-as-gate). Broadens detection from surface-bundling to default-resolution.

ruledOut.reason: cli has an environmental signal (active runtime) the others lack; it is detection-defaulted, the other three are pure-defer

focus: Contrarian steelman: is auto-default actually fine? (falsifiable four-shape rule; recover cli as detection-defaulted)
noveltyJustification: Assembles iters 1-4 into a falsifiable four-shape decision rule (the encoding deliverable). Recovers cli as detection-defaulted (one real disagreement with Run 1). Honest-downgrades the three nulls from settled to directional-pending-measurement. Names falsifiers per shape.

ruledOut.reason: Three of five (deep-loop, mcp-tooling, sk-design) satisfy neither condition (no env signal AND not catch-all anchor); unsupported
Run 1's own no-corpus method makes them unfalsifiable in the over-deferring direction; they are directional-pending-measurement, not validated
